mission.title: vault: Support for shutting down Vault Agent when Job ends (possibly via HTTP POST)
mission.description: Support for shutting down Vault Agent when Job ends (possibly via HTTP POST). Requested by 40+ users.

steps.title: Check current vault setup
steps.description:
Verify your vault version and configuration:
```bash
vault version
```
This feature requires a working vault installation.

steps.title: Review vault configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant vault configuration:
We have several long-running Kubernetes batch/v1 Jobs that require credentials from an injected `vault agent`.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Support for shutting down Vault Agent when Job ends…
steps.description:
We had problems with our Helm jobs (database migrations) and the Vault Agents recently, so we ended up pulling the Vault Agent from the Jobs and replaced it by running a script as our entry point to curl the Vault API and set the necessary variables for our migrations to complete.  This way, our
```yaml
env:
          - name: VAULT_ROLE
            value: {{ printf "%s-%s-%s" .Values.application.partOf (include "chart.serviceAccountName" .) "migration" | quote }}
          - name: VAULT_ADDR
            value: "http://vault.vault-system:8200"
          - name: REGEX_TOKEN
            value: "client_token\":\"(.*)\",\"accessor"
          - name: REGEX_USER
            value: "username\":\"(.*)\"}"
          - name: REGEX_PASSWORD
            value: "password\":\"(.*)\","
```

steps.title: Upgrade vault to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade vault:
```bash
# Check current version
vault version
# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/hashicorp/vault
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Support for shutting down Vault Agent when Job ends…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: We had problems with our Helm jobs (database migrations) and the Vault Agents recently, so we ended up pulling the Vault Agent from the Jobs and replaced it by running a script as our entry point to curl the Vault API and set the necessary variables for our migrations to complete.  This way, our jobs didn't get hung because the sidecar did not shut down.
codeSnippets:
env:
          - name: VAULT_ROLE
            value: {{ printf "%s-%s-%s" .Values.application.partOf (include "chart.serviceAccountName" .) "migration" | quote }}
          - name: VAULT_ADDR
            value: "http://vault.vault-system:8200"
          - name: REGEX_TOKEN
            value: "client_token\":\"(.*)\",\"accessor"
          - name: REGEX_USER
            value: "username\":\"(.*)\"}"
          - name: REGEX_PASSWORD
            value: "password\":\"(.*)\","

prerequisites.description: A working vault installation or development environment.
